narrative:
Mahoning County has 153,352 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.4% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +12.1% D−R vs +27.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
